title: ETL Apollo Chrome Plated Toast Rack Organiser, Stainless Steel 6 Slice Bread Holder Stand
features: This classic toast rack is the ideal piece of tableware for the breakfast table, holds 6 pieces of hot crisp toast, ready for serving
Specially designed 6 slot horseshoe shape bread holder is perfect for keeping the toast crisp and preventing it from going soggy.
Very sturdy and hard-wearing construction which also adds an elegant and stylish touch to the table. Wipe clean, chrome finish.
Looped handle for easy carrying the cooked toast from the toaster to the family breakfast dining table.
High quality shiny chrome, easy to clean and dishwasher safe, store near toaster ready for using.
description: The Apollo stainless steel toast rack is the ideal for breakfast holding crisp cooked toast ready for serving. This has a specially designed 6 slot horseshoe shaped bread holder to keep toast crisp and not soggy. The very sturdy robust and hard-wearing construction of the metal is also elegant and stylish. Looped handle for easy carrying the cooked toast from the toaster to the table. Great for breakfast, lunch, tea, dinner parties and many catering occasions. High quality chrome is easy to clean. The Apollo toast rack is easy to clean and dishwasher safe. Dimensions: 15.7cm. Apollo offers contemporary and innovative functional kitchen tools made from tough, high quality materials that will stand the test of time, providing unrivalled performance in any kitchen environment.
